verses.latin_vulgate: Benedixisti, Domine, terram tuam ;  avertisti captivitatem Jacob.
verses.king_james: Lord, thou hast been favourable unto thy land: thou hast brought back the captivity of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Remisisti iniquitatem plebis tuæ ;  operuisti omnia peccata eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָ֭שָׂאתָ עֲוֺ֣ן עַמֶּ֑ךָ כִּסִּ֖יתָ כׇל־חַטָּאתָ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast forgiven the iniquity of thy people, thou hast covered all their sin. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mitigasti omnem iram tuam ;  avertisti ab ira indignationis tuæ.
verses.king_james: Thou hast taken away all thy wrath: thou hast turned thyself from the fierceness of thine anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Converte nos, Deus salutaris noster,  et averte iram tuam a nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁ֭וּבֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעֵ֑נוּ וְהָפֵ֖ר כַּעַסְךָ֣ עִמָּֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: Turn us, O God of our salvation, and cause thine anger toward us to cease.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid in æternum irasceris nobis ?  aut extendes iram tuam a generatione in generationem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַלְעוֹלָ֥ם תֶּאֱנַף־בָּ֑נוּ תִּמְשֹׁ֥ךְ אַ֝פְּךָ֗ לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Wilt thou be angry with us for ever? wilt thou draw out thine anger to all generations?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, tu conversus vivificabis nos,  et plebs tua lætabitur in te.
verses.king_james: Wilt thou not revive us again: that thy people may rejoice in thee?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ostende nobis, Domine, misericordiam tuam,  et salutare tuum da nobis.
verses.king_james: Shew us thy mercy, O Lord, and grant us thy salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audiam quid loquatur in me Dominus Deus,  quoniam loquetur pacem in plebem suam,  et super sanctos suos,  et in eos qui convertuntur ad cor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׁמְעָ֗ה מַה־יְדַבֵּר֮ הָאֵ֢ל ׀ יְ֫הֹוָ֥ה כִּ֤י ׀ יְדַבֵּ֬ר שָׁל֗וֹם אֶל־עַמּ֥וֹ וְאֶל־חֲסִידָ֑יו וְאַל־יָשׁ֥וּבוּ לְכִסְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: I will hear what God the Lord will speak: for he will speak peace unto his people, and to his saints: but let them not turn again to folly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen prope timentes eum salutare ipsius,  ut inhabitet gloria in terra nostra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֤ךְ קָר֣וֹב לִירֵאָ֣יו יִשְׁע֑וֹ לִשְׁכֹּ֖ן כָּב֣וֹד בְּאַרְצֵֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: Surely his salvation is nigh them that fear him; that glory may dwell in our land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misericordia et veritas obviaverunt sibi ;  justitia et pax osculatæ sunt.
verses.king_james: Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veritas de terra orta est,  et justitia de cælo prospexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֭מֶת מֵאֶ֣רֶץ תִּצְמָ֑ח וְ֝צֶ֗דֶק מִשָּׁמַ֥יִם נִשְׁקָֽף׃
verses.king_james: Truth shall spring out of the earth; and righteousness shall look down from heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim Dominus dabit benignitatem,  et terra nostra dabit fructum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־יְ֭הֹוָה יִתֵּ֣ן הַטּ֑וֹב וְ֝אַרְצֵ֗נוּ תִּתֵּ֥ן יְבוּלָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, the Lord shall give that which is good; and our land shall yield her increase.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia ante eum ambulabit,  et ponet in via gressus suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֶ֭דֶק לְפָנָ֣יו יְהַלֵּ֑ךְ וְיָשֵׂ֖ם לְדֶ֣רֶךְ פְּעָמָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Righteousness shall go before him; and shall set us in the way of his steps.
